issues.description: spec.md still contains stale pre-lock D3-extension instructions (What this set delivers item 3; S2 step 6 tests; S2 Ends-with; S2 Progress keys) that contradict the S1 verdict, the S1 Audit Lock, and corrected S2 step 4; this can mislead Session 2 into implementing/testing a rejected D3 change instead of the new content-aware close-time validator.
issues.resolution_notes: Replaced all remaining D3-extension instructions with the locked wording (D3 unchanged; add content-aware close-time validator). Updated What-this-set-delivers item 3, S2 step 6 tests, S2 Touches (dropped writer_discipline.py, added close_session*), S2 Ends-with (added validator), and S2 Progress keys (validator landed, not D3 extended).

issues.description: Q6 lock text in verdict.md and spec.md added a `--accept-suggestions` force-bypass that is not supported by the two raw consensus outputs and is not part of the operator's stated Q6 choice (hard TTY / soft non-TTY), so the synthesis was not fully faithful on gate semantics.
issues.resolution_notes: Removed the definitive bypass claim from both verdict.md Q6 and spec.md S1-lock Q6; reframed as an explicit S3 implementation detail to be designed consistent with the Set-048 gate, noting it was NOT part of the consensus or the operator's Q6 choice and is not locked.
